text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: What was that?! Spe, what was that?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Do you know how much I was looking forward to this?! Today was supposed to be the day we finally competed for real!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: I've wanted to run with you guys for so long. I wanted to run with you.

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: But then you had to run the race like that!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: If you don't even want to run, then don't enter races!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The first race of the fall, the Kyoto Daishoten, ended with Special
Week taking seventh place, the lowest she's ever placed.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her performance that day was completely different from her other
races... It was almost like she'd lost her reason for running.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's unlikely that her loss against Grass Wonder would cause such a
shift. There must be some other reason...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Riiing! Riiing!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Hello, Trainer?"

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: I'm sorry to call you so late at night...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Night? Ah, I suppose it's pretty late there. Here in Japan, it's still the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Night? Ah, I suppose it's pretty late there. Here in Japan, it's still the
afternoon.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Ah... right, there's a time difference. I'm still not used to that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: Anyway, um, I'm calling about... Spe's last race.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
It's late at night where she is, but what she saw in the Kyoto
Daishoten must be dire enough to call right away.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "I've never seen Spe look so lost while running."

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Same here. She had a little trouble focusing during practice too. I
want to help her, but...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Same here. She had a little trouble focusing during practice too. I
want to help her, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I have no idea what could have her so down... I convey my helpless
state while Silence Suzuka listens without a word.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
I've felt lost before too. Especially when my strategy didn't work, or
when I didn't place as well as I wanted...

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
However, it was always your words that helped me get back on track
and move forward.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
Even knowing it went against your job as a trainer, you still told me to
run the way I wanted. I remember feeling saved when you said that.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
So cheer up. I'm sure the same thing will happen with Spe. You just
need to talk to her.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text:
If there's one thing that the members of Team Sirius know, it's that
you're always thinking of us.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've always confronted my trainees' issues head-on. But it's hard to do
so when I don't know what Special Week's issue is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
I've always confronted my trainees' issues head-on. But it's hard to do
so when I don't know what Special Week's issue is.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe I can figure something out from what I know about her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Maybe I can figure something out from what I know about her...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: She's always bursting with energy...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: And her passion for running is so pure.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
No matter what happens, she's always been focused on making her
dream come true.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: The best in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Even if I become the best in Japan, what good—

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: That's it... That's what's wrong.

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Huh?"

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The words she muttered at practice echo in my head. I'm still not sure
why she's thinking that way, but...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
That thought, which I barely noticed at the time, has probably been
festering inside Special Week since then.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: "Even if I become the best in Japan, what good will that do..."

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "Um... Trainer?"

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Suzuka! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Sorry, Suzuka! I have to go!

text_block_list.name: Silence Suzuka
text_block_list.text: "All right. I leave her in your hands."

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Usually at this hour, the track would be full of racers, but with the rain
muddying the track, it's practically a ghost town.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Out on that silent course, I spot my trainee—not running, just simply
standing in the rain.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: Spe...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
I'm guessing you haven't run yet today. Well, I don't blame you, with
the track like this.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You know, Spe... Your dream's a difficult one.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You know, Spe... Your dream's a difficult one.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
Yeah... it really is. It's like I'm looking at something shining far off in
the distance. And now I don't know what that something is.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After winning the spring Tenno Sho and seeing all those smiling faces,
I thought I'd finally found the path to making my dream reality.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I remember thinking that maybe the best in Japan is someone who can
bring joy to others.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: But I don't have near enough strength to be the best in Japan...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: And well, even if I did achieve that goal someday...

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: Not even the best in Japan can compete on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
After seeing how people viewed "the best in Japan" after the Arc, I
felt so frustrated... and hopeless.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
If the best in Japan couldn't even compete on the world stage...
maybe I should just give up.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But how could I think such things when I'm not even the best yet? I
knew I had to forget all this—that I had to work harder! But when I
tried...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That one question just kept coming back... Even if I become the best
in Japan, what good will that do?

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
What good am I doing with my races? Do I even have a reason to run
anymore?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
So it wasn't just one thing. Her recent loss, our decision to give up on
international races, and her friend's recent defeat...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
All of those events together have burdened her heart, causing her to
lose her way on the path to her dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You know, when I first saw you, I didn't have total confidence in your
skills.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Huh?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: However, when I saw you run, I couldn't help but believe in you.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
You just came all the way from Hokkaido, and your races were all over
the place.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
But you gave training your all in order to make your dreams come
true. Just watching you filled me with joy.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
It was like watching the protagonist of a story. No matter what
happened, you never lost hope. And before I knew it, I was
completely drawn in...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You said you didn't know what good you were doing, right?

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can tell you that you brought me joy and a sense of hope... I
began to dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Well, I can tell you that you brought me joy and a sense of hope... I
began to dream.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And let me tell you, out of all the other racers, you're the best in
Japan to dream alongside!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
And let me tell you, out of all the other racers, you're the best in
Japan to dream alongside!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: I'm the best in Japan... to dream alongside?

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
The best in Japan... It slipped out in the moment, but something
about that statement feels right.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: I get it now... There's not just one answer, Spe.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
Being the best in Japan doesn't have to mean one thing. In fact, it can
mean as many things as the number of people watching you.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: As many things as the number of people watching...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: And because there's so many answers, that means they can all change!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
So even if you don't match up with the current idea of the best in
Japan...

text_block_list.name: Skeptical Fan
text_block_list.text: Not even the best in Japan can compete on the world stage.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: You just need to become the best racer in Japan that can win the Prix de l'Arc de Triomphe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
There are plenty of forms the best in Japan could take, and they all
have their purpose. They're all doing someone good...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: And you could become any one of them, Spe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text: And you could become any one of them, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I could become... any one of them?
Ah...

text_block_list.name: Young Special Week
text_block_list.text: What kind of Umamusume is the best racer in Japan?

text_block_list.name: Special Week's Mom
text_block_list.text:
Well, let's see... I'd say it's an Umamusume who gives races her all and
crosses the finish line without issue.

text_block_list.name: Young Special Week
text_block_list.text: That's all I need to do to be the best in Japan?

text_block_list.name: Special Week's Mom
text_block_list.text: Yeah, according to your mom, anyway!

text_block_list.name: Special Week's Mom
text_block_list.text:
But I bet that's not the only answer. I'm sure there's lots of ways to be
the best in Japan.

text_block_list.name: Young Special Week
text_block_list.text: Like what?

text_block_list.name: Special Week's Mom
text_block_list.text: For example... You could be the most famous, or...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
That's right... Mom said the same thing. She has her own idea of what
makes me the best in Japan...

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All your fans have a different idea of what the best in Japan means.
For me, you're the best racer in Japan to chase my dreams with.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All your fans have a different idea of what the best in Japan means.
For me, you're the best racer in Japan to chase my dreams with.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text: Special Week directs her gaze towards me.

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Her eyes are wet with tears, but the way they glisten reminds me of a
flickering fire.

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
The autumn Tenno Sho, the Japan Cup, the Arima Kinen... I want to
see all those dreams of glory come true together with you, Spe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We'll make all those dreams come true and carve you into the hearts
of every person in Japan—no, the whole world!
choice_data_list:
We'll show them that you, Special Week, are
the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
We'll make all those dreams come true and carve you into the hearts
of every person in Japan—no, the whole world!
choice_data_list:
We'll show them that you, Special Week, are
the best racer in Japan!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! I'll run, then run some more, and then...

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
I'll become someone everyone can happily call the best racer in
Japan!

text_block_list.name: Gold Ship
text_block_list.text:
Whoa, whoa, whoa, you're not going to run in the middle of this
mudfest, are ya?

text_block_list.name: Mejiro McQueen
text_block_list.text: Hehe... If you'd like, we could go for a run together.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: I'll follow behind Spe!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Let's do this, Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Y-you guys?!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to start training! Get out there and run your heart out,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: <username>
text_block_list.text:
All right, time to start training! Get out there and run your heart out,
Spe!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Right! I've got this!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
It's finally here, the center of the autumn season, the autumn Tenno
Sho! This year's lineup is as ferocious as ever!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
We've got the Double Crown champion Seiun Sky! Not to mention the
racer that fought her tooth-and-nail, King Halo!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Then we have the runner who came out on top in her race against
giants, Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi! Only one racer stands in the way of the
Golden Generation's domination, Mejiro Bright!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
And of course, the winner of this year's spring Tenno Sho, Special
Week, will be competing to see if she can take home the autumn
shield too!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
With all these talented racers, this is sure to be the fight of the
century! But just who among them will emerge victorious?!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Spe.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Ah, Tsuru!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
...I'm sorry about our last race. You had every right to be mad after
that terrible performance.

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text:
But that won't happen today! I promise I'll give a performance that
will make it up to you!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Ehehe... Now there's the eyes I spent so much time chasing—the eyes of the Derby Umamusume!

text_block_list.name: Tsurumaru Tsuyoshi
text_block_list.text: Now we're talking! You better bring it today!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Yeah, I'll give this race my all!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Now they're headed into the straightaway! From the inside comes
King Halo! But Seiun Sky follows close behind from the outside!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
But from even further outside comes Special Week! Special Week is
gaining at ferocious speed!

text_block_list.name: Special Week
text_block_list.text: Graaaaaugh!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Special Week! Special Week! Special Week! She takes the lead and
finishes first!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
She's a true champion after all! Special Week has now taken both the
spring and fall shields!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And with a time of 1:58.00, she's broken a new record! She may have lost her last race, but with this win, she's made a stunning comeback!
